title: Open Field Exploration: Locomotor Activity and Anxiety Assessment in Mice
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"18mo5","text":"This protocol describes assessment of locomotor activity and anxiety-related behavior in adult mice using","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8dr4r","text":"an open-field arena. Total path length and corner crossings serve as indices of locomotor activity; entries","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ald62","text":"into the centre serve as a measure of conflict resolution or anxiolysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ec5s","text":"•       Testing order should be counterbalanced or randomized across genotypes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8fav","text":"•       All testing should be performed at the same time of day across animals.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cn8dk","text":"•       Experimenter should leave the room or remain still/silent during the trial.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"f95ii","text":"•       Allow mice to habituate to the procedure room for ≥30 min before testing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8imib","text":"•       Prepare 70% ethanol and wipes for inter-animal cleaning.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"91kh8","text":"•       Test the recording and tracking system before the first animal.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"9vpsg","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b1kua","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"bvqrj","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","2_0":"","2_1":"","3_0":"","3_1":"","4_0":"","4_1":"","5_0":"","5_1":""},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":[140,"395"],"data":[["\u003cb\u003eSubjects\u003c/b\u003e","Adult WT and KO littermates (~2 months old)"],["\u003cb\u003eArena\u003c/b\u003e","50 × 50 cm2 square open-field arena"],["\u003cb\u003eTracking\u003c/b\u003e","ANY-maze video tracking equipment and software (Stoelting Europe, Ireland)"],["\u003cb\u003eCleaning\u003c/b\u003e","70% ethanol solution + absorbent wipes"],["\u003cb\u003eDark habituation\u003c/b\u003e","Dark room or light-proof box for pre-trial habituation"]],"guid":"494CA214EB45423D8923DB87FCC17FB9","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["\u003cb\u003eSubjects\u003c/b\u003e","Adult WT and KO littermates (~2 months old)"],["\u003cb\u003eArena\u003c/b\u003e","50 × 50 cm2 square open-field arena"],["\u003cb\u003eTracking\u003c/b\u003e","ANY-maze video tracking equipment and software (Stoelting Europe, Ireland)"],["\u003cb\u003eCleaning\u003c/b\u003e","70% ethanol solution + absorbent wipes"],["\u003cb\u003eDark habituation\u003c/b\u003e","Dark room or light-proof box for pre-trial habituation"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Place each mouse in a dark holding space (or covered holding cage) adjacent to the test room for 30 min immediately before testing.
Transfer the mouse gently to a corner of the open-field arena. Start ANY-maze recording immediately. Allow free exploration for 10 min.

Record behavior for 10 min ANY-maze automatically tracks position and computes: (a) total path length (cm) and corner crossings — locomotor activity indices, which are highly correlated and mainly indicate thigmotactic walking near the walls of the arena; (b) entries into the centre — recorded as a measure of conflict resolution or anxiolysis.
After 10 min, return the mouse to its home cage. Thoroughly clean the arena floor and walls with 70% ethanol. Allow ethanol to fully evaporate before placing the next mouse.
Export total path length, corner crossings, and centre entries for each animal from ANY-maze. Apply appropriate statistical tests comparing WT vs KO.
creator: Sarah van Veen
